name: Query Plan Management (QPM)
postStartCommand: bash -c 'bash .devcontainer/scripts/start-ybdb.sh 1 && ysqlsh -h 127.0.0.1 -X -f init-qpm/setup.sql && echo "" && echo "▶  Terminal → Run Task → qpm-demo   (guided QPM demo: bash prompt.sh)" && echo "▶  Terminal → Run Task → qpm-ws     (Workshop shell for manual exercises)"'
